calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrea Ditullio for Elvira Orly (Administrator).

Ms. Ditullio stated that she was seeking an order for final distribution as she believed 4 months began in April of 2006 for filing of any creditor's claims and that the Order For Probate gave general powers, but that the box for full authority on the special letters was not checked. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Continued To Aug-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar May-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Release
Off Calendar May-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-21-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Compensation For Attorney For Personal Representative
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for and with Jeff Mogannam. Mark Byrne for and with Elvira Orly.

Mr. Jagiello stated that the fees charged by Mr. Byrne's law firm were excessive, argued that the order signed in Family Law limited the fees to no more than $3,000.00, and stated that that there was little to done except have the agreement enforced into a judgment. Mr. Byrne stated that the services he provided were in the family law court, that he had to appear in Family Law court in order to have the deeds signed by the Clerk and that his client was very obstructive. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: B. Mann.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Continued To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for Jeff Mogannam (Contestant). Andrea Ditullio for Elvira Orly (Special Administrtaor).

Ms. Jagiello reported that a settlement with the former wife had been reached, that the appraisal had been performed, that the audit had been completed and requested a continuance. The matter was continued to May 6, 2008 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Kathy Kollehner CSR#4102. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Continued To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Mar-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrea Ditullio for Elvira Orly (Special Administrator). Barbara Jagiello for the Contestant.

Ms. Jagiello requested a continuance stating that the divorce proceeding was still pending, and that they were still waiting for the apprasial and the audit from the Franchise Tax Board. The matter was continued to March 18, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Barbara Jagiello appearing for Jeff Mogannam. Emily Warren appearing for special administrator Elvira Orly. Ms. Jagiello reported that Mrs. Mogannam has not signed the documents in the Family Court and the Family Court will order the Clerk to sign for her. She also reported on the Will Contest status and the parties are working to resolve the issue. Matter is continued to 1/16/08.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Stella Obi.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Instructing Special Administrator, Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Emily Warren appearing for and with special administrator Elvira Orly. Norma Mogannam is also in court. Court will start with the Petition for Instructions before the Sale Petition. Court will grant the petition for instructions with modification to the order. The Special Administrator is instructed to carry out the Family Court Order. Mrs. Mongannam questioned if there is a valid judgment in Family Court. This Court can not do anything with a Family Court Order. Mrs. Mogannam is objecting to the Sale going forward today. She said she did not get notice of the Sale and she does not know what is going on.
On Sale of 1019 Bosworth Street, San Francisco, CA, Mrs. Mogannam wanted to overbid but she did not have a Cashier's check for a 10% deposit. She is dissatisfy with the Family Court order and this Court can not reconsider that order. Sale is confirmed at $700,050.00. N/B. Two orders signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Guitron.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Continued To Oct-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mark Byrne appearing for Special Administrator to assist in the Family Law matter. Norma Mogannam appearing as the wife. Emily Warren appearing for Special Administrator Elvira Orly. Barbara Jagiello appearing for Jeff Mogannam. Mr. Byrne reported that the division of property has been determined in Family Court. Will Contest is still pending. Mrs. Mogannam made a statement regarding the Family Court order. This Court can not do anything about the Family Law case. Mrs. Mogannam requested to have the Court ordered counsel to send all notices to her. Court did not see a notice issue. Mr. Byrne is working on transferring property into probate. The Petition for probate and Will Contest are continued to 10/10.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Del Rosario.

MINI MINUTES: Elvira Orly, special administrator is in court. Barbara Jagiello appearing for and with Jeff Mogannam. Mrs. Mogannam is also in court. This Court has said that this case belongs in Family Law but Family Law Court said that this case belongs in Probate Court. This Court accepts the case. Ms. Orly wants an evidentary hearing to determine what goes in the estate and what belongs to Mrs. Mogannam. Mrs. Mogannam has other wills. Court wants her to get counsel. Matter is continued to 9/1 at 9am for evidentary hearing. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
